assertions.assertion: Creates a new IdentityResource with name 'employee_info'

assertions.rationale: All three claims present in userClaims array

assertions.assertion: An interactive client includes 'employee_info' in its AllowedScopes along with 'openid'
assertions.rationale: Client includes both openid and employee_info

assertions.assertion: The IdentityResources.OpenId() is still present (required by OIDC spec)
assertions.rationale: OpenId() is in the identity resources list
